Description: Structural Engineer — design development and detail drawing production (Phase 1 and Phase 2)
Notes: Lead structural design: section cut schedule, design questions, building cross-sections, longitudinal sections, service pit details, mezzanine details, wash bay details, crane support details, embedment details, stair details, misc details, cross-ref reconciliation

Description: BIM Technician — CAD/BIM modelling and sheet production
Notes: Drawing production support: modelling structural sections, sheet setup, detail drawing production, cross-reference management
Owner coordination (Step 3), multi-discipline coordination review (Step 15), IFC issue oversight (Step 17)

Description: Cost Estimator — quantity takeoff and benchmarking support
Notes: Support for material specification matrix, cost benchmarking of structural elements

Description: Internal quality check — structural engineer QC review (Phase 3)
Notes: Internal QC checklist completion per 12-item checklist; included in Structural Engineer hours (ITEM-001)
Distribute drafts to Arch/Mech/Elec/Plumb; resolve conflicts; included in PM hours (ITEM-003)

Description: P.Eng. review and stamp — IFC drawing set
Notes: P.Eng. licensed in Alberta signs and stamps all sheets; included in Structural Engineer hours (ITEM-001)
Assign IFC revision designation, issue to GC, file copy to Owner; included in PM hours (ITEM-003)
